title: Phaseolaster praetermissa
taxonomy: Phaseolaster praetermissa is classified as a species of fungus in the order Rhytismatales. It belongs to the family Rhytismataceae and is considered a type of leaf spot fungus. This classification is based on its characteristics and the way it grows on plants. The exact classification may be subject to change as new research emerges. More information on this specific fungus is needed for a more detailed classification.
